title: EMERGENCY INTERIM STATE
doc_html:
CHAPTER 11.  EMERGENCY INTERIM STATE

EXECUTIVE SUCCESSION

§851.  Short title

This chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Emergency Interim State Executive Succession Act."

Acts 1963, No. 111, §1.
